clinical_blockers: Fixed one-to-two-week review, the combined multi-section history draft, and broad duration presets remain unsupported.
The workflow must not generate sedatives, hypnotics, melatonin, CBT-I, sleep-hygiene instructions, referral, or medicine changes unless clinician-stated.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
